title: Saraswathi Kshetramu, Ananthasagar
tagline: Saraswathi Kshetramu, Ananthasagar — spiritual town of Telangana

overview.short: Saraswathi Kshetramu is a Hindu Temple of Goddess Saraswathi located in the Ananthasagar, Chinna Kodur Mandal, Siddipet Division, Siddipet district of Telangana.
overview.description: Saraswathi Kshetramu is a Hindu Temple of Goddess Saraswathi located in the Ananthasagar, Chinna Kodur Mandal, Siddipet Division, Siddipet district of Telangana. The temple was built on Friday, 2 May 1980 (Roudri Year, Vaishakha month) by Astakala Narasimha Rama Sharma (Astavadhani). It is located between Siddipet to Karimnagar, 22 km away from the former, 125 km from Hyderabad and 63 km from Medak.

topPlaces.name: Shanigaram Reservoir
topPlaces.description: Shanigaram Reservoir (Telugu:శనిగరం జలాశయం) also known as Shanigaram Cheruvu is a medium irrigation project constructed across the Shanigaram River, at Shanigaram Village, Siddipet District, Telangana. This is one of the oldest reservoir constructed in 1891 under Nizam rule.

topPlaces.name: Bejjanki
topPlaces.description: Bejjanki is a mandal in Siddipet district of the Indian state of Telangana. It consists of 25 villages.

topPlaces.name: Gagillapur
topPlaces.description: . Gagillapur is a village in Bejjanki mandal, Siddipet district, Telangana, India. It is located on the bank of the Moyaduthummeda River and has a population of 1,618.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Saraswathi Kshetramu, Ananthasagar?
faq.a: The best time to visit Saraswathi Kshetramu, Ananthasagar is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Saraswathi Kshetramu, Ananthasagar?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (123 km) and the nearest railway station is Secunderabad Junction (Hyderabad) (100 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Saraswathi Kshetramu, Ananthasagar?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Saraswathi Kshetramu, Ananthasagar at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Saraswathi Kshetramu, Ananthasagar?
faq.a: Stays in Saraswathi Kshetramu, Ananthasagar start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Saraswathi Kshetramu, Ananthasagar?
faq.a: The top attractions are Shanigaram Reservoir, Bejjanki, Gagillapur.
